name: Samsung Galaxy A22 5G
description: Blazing-fast 5G connectivity, Snapdragon processor, 6.6" FHD+ display, 5000mAh battery, and 48MP quad camera. Sleek design built for performance at an unbeatable price.

name: IPhone 15 Pro Max
description: Powered by A17 Pro chip, titanium frame, 48MP ProCamera system with 5x optical zoom, Action Button, and all-day battery — the most powerful iPhone ever made.

name: Red Magic Pro
description: Snapdragon 8 Gen 3, 6.8" AMOLED 165Hz display, built-in cooling fan, 6500mAh battery, and customizable shoulder triggers — engineered purely for mobile gaming dominance.

name: ASUS ROG Phone
description: Ultra-responsive 144Hz display, AirTrigger haptic controls, 65W fast charging, and Aero Active Cooler compatibility — the ultimate gaming smartphone for competitive players.

name: Lenovo Legion Pro 7i
description: Intel Core i9 13th Gen, RTX 4070 GPU, 32GB DDR5, 1TB NVMe SSD, 16" QHD 240Hz Mini-LED display — Lenovo's flagship for uncompromising gaming performance.

name: Dell Latitude 5540
description: Intel Core i7, 16GB RAM, 512GB SSD, 15.6" FHD display with MIL-STD-810H durability, fingerprint reader, and enterprise-grade security for professionals on the move.

name: Apple MacBook M1
description: Apple M1 chip with 8-core CPU and GPU, 8GB unified memory, 256GB SSD, Retina display, up to 18 hours battery — the world's best thin-and-light laptop.

name: Apple MacBook Air M2
description: M2 chip delivers 18% faster CPU performance, 10-core GPU, 15.3" Liquid Retina display, MagSafe charging, and fanless silent design in a beautifully thin aluminum body.

name: Kingston 16GB DDR4 3200MHz RAM
description: High-performance DDR4 SDRAM module at 3200MHz, plug-and-play compatibility with Intel and AMD platforms, CL22 latency, and lifetime warranty for reliable everyday computing.

name: ADATA XPG 32GB DDR4 Gaming RAM Kit
description: XPG spectral RGB DDR4 dual-channel kit, 3600MHz overclocking support, heat spreader design, XMP 2.0 profile, and stunning lighting — maximize your gaming rig's potential.

name: Samsung 980 NVMe SSD 1TB
description: PCIe 3.0 NVMe M.2 SSD, sequential reads up to 3500MB/s, optimized heat control, and Samsung's Intelligent TurboWrite — perfect for gaming, editing, and system drives.

name: SanDisk Portable Solid State Drive 500GB
description: Compact USB-C portable SSD with 520MB/s read speed, up to 2m drop protection, and pocket-friendly design — fast, durable storage for smartphones and laptops on the go.

name: WD Black SN770M NVMe SSD 1TB
description: WD Black PCIe Gen4 M.2 SSD delivering 5150MB/s sequential reads, optimized for handheld gaming consoles and laptops, with 5-year limited warranty for long-term reliability.

name: Seagate BarraCuda 3.5-inch Internal HDD 500GB
description: Reliable 7200RPM SATA III hard drive, 32MB cache, 500GB storage capacity, whisper-quiet operation — an ideal upgrade for desktop PCs and gaming console storage expansion.

name: MSI GeForce RTX 4060 Ventus 2X OC 8GB
description: NVIDIA Ada Lovelace architecture, DLSS 3, 8GB GDDR6, dual TORX 3.0 fans, and factory overclock — delivers smooth 1080p and 1440p gaming at exceptional value.

name: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4070
description: 12GB GDDR6X VRAM, third-gen RT cores, DLSS 3 Frame Generation, AV1 encode, and 5888 CUDA cores — stunning 4K gaming performance in a power-efficient Ada Lovelace package.

name: RGB Mechanical Gaming Keyboard
description: Tactile Cherry MX switches, per-key RGB backlighting, 100% anti-ghosting with N-key rollover, aircraft-grade aluminum frame, and removable USB-C cable — built for gamers.

name: Logitech K980 Slim Solar Wireless Keyboard
description: Charges from any light source, 2-year battery life in darkness, Bluetooth & USB receiver dual mode, whisper-quiet keys, and full-size layout for comfortable daily productivity.

name: Microsoft Wireless Ergonomic Mouse
description: Precision BlueTrack sensor works on any surface, 12-month battery life, contoured comfort grip, and 2.4GHz wireless with nano receiver — dependable for all-day productivity.

name: Logitech G502 Hero Gaming Mouse
description: HERO 25K sensor, 25,600 DPI, 11 programmable buttons, adjustable weight system, and LIGHTSYNC RGB lighting — precision-tuned for competitive FPS and MMO gaming.

name: Takis Fuego Hot Chili Pepper & Lime Chips
description: Intensely rolled tortilla chips dusted with fiery chili pepper and zesty lime seasoning. Crunchy, bold, and addictively spicy — the fan-favourite snack for extreme heat lovers.

name: Be Real Assorted Flavour Chips
description: Crispy potato chips in a bold assorted pack featuring BBQ, cheese, and sour cream flavours. Made with quality ingredients for a satisfying snack at any time of day.

name: Lay's Classic Chips
description: Thinly sliced, perfectly seasoned, and delightfully crunchy — Lay's Classic is the world's favourite potato chip. Light, airy, and impossible to put down.

name: Lay's Baked Potato Crisps
description: All the satisfying crunch with 65% less fat than regular chips. Lay's Baked delivers real potato taste in a guilt-free snack perfect for lunch boxes and movie nights.

name: Red Hot Potato Chips
description: Fiery red hot seasoning meets perfectly crispy potato chips — UTZ Red Hot delivers bold heat with every crunchy bite. A spicy American classic loved by heat-seekers.

name: Bakeri Coconut Biscuits
description: Crisp and golden Bakeri biscuits in classic and toasted coconut varieties. Baked with quality ingredients for a light, crumbly texture that pairs perfectly with tea or coffee.

name: Original Lemon Sandwich Biscuits
description: Two buttery biscuit layers filled with smooth, tangy lemon cream — EBM's iconic lemon sandwich is a household favourite in a generous family-size 432g pack.

name: Premium Assorted Chocolate Gift Box
description: A curated selection of dark, milk, and exotic chocolates with velvety ganache, crispy pralines, and fruity centres — the perfect indulgent gift for any chocolate lover.

name: KitKat Matcha & Milk Chocolate Bar Collection
description: Crisp wafer fingers coated in smooth milk chocolate and rare Japanese matcha white chocolate. Snap into a moment of pure delight with KitKat's iconic bar collection.

name: Hershey's Milk Chocolate Bar
description: America's most beloved chocolate since 1900 — rich, creamy Hershey's milk chocolate with that unmistakably smooth taste. Perfect for snacking, baking, and sharing.

name: Cadbury Dairy Milk Fruit & Nut 3.5oz
description: Velvety Cadbury Dairy Milk chocolate studded with plump raisins and crunchy whole almonds. A timeless British classic delivering the perfect balance of sweet and nutty.

name: Farm Fresh Full Cream Milk 1 Litre
description: Pasteurized whole milk sourced from free-range grass-fed cows — rich in calcium, vitamin D, and natural protein. Creamy, fresh taste for drinking, cooking, and baking.

name: Great Value Plain Nonfat Yogurt 32oz
description: Smooth, tangy nonfat yogurt with live active cultures, zero added sugar, and high-quality protein. Versatile for breakfast parfaits, dips, smoothies, or healthy snacking.

name: Dannon Oikos Pro Vanilla Protein Yogurt
description: 20g of protein per serving, creamy vanilla flavour, live active cultures, and zero artificial sweeteners — Oikos Pro is the smart Greek yogurt for active, health-focused lifestyles.

name: Anchor Pure Unsalted Butter Sticks 250g
description: Churned from 100% fresh cream, Anchor unsalted butter delivers a rich, clean flavour with a smooth, velvety texture — the trusted choice for baking, pastry, and everyday cooking.

name: Sharp Cheddar Cheese Slices 400g
description: Aged sharp cheddar with bold, tangy flavour and firm crumbly texture. Perfect for burgers, sandwiches, grilled cheese, and cheeseboards — sliced for everyday convenience.

name: Swiss & Blue Cheese Selection
description: A gourmet pairing of nutty Swiss Emmental and bold blue-veined cheese — rich, complex flavours ideal for cheese boards, wine pairings, salads, and gourmet sandwiches.

name: Premium Basmati Long Grain Rice 5kg
description: Extra-long aged Basmati grains with signature floral aroma, fluffy non-sticky texture, and low glycemic index. The go-to rice for biryani, pilaf, and everyday Pakistani cooking.

name: Whole Wheat All-Purpose Flour 2kg
description: Stone-ground from premium hard wheat, this versatile flour is perfect for roti, bread, cakes, and pasta. Fine texture ensures consistent rise and authentic home-baked flavour.

name: Mazola Pure Corn Cooking Oil 1 Litre
description: Heart-healthy corn oil with a high smoke point, zero cholesterol, and rich in polyunsaturated fats. Ideal for frying, baking, and sautéing with a light, neutral flavour.

name: Refined White Granulated Sugar 1kg
description: Pure, fine-grain white sugar processed for consistent sweetness and quick dissolving. Hygienically packaged for lasting freshness — essential for beverages, baking, and cooking.

name: Assorted Carbonated Soft Drinks 1.5L
description: Ice-cold carbonated soft drinks bursting with refreshing flavour — available in classic cola, lemon-lime, and orange. Perfect chilled at parties, meals, or any occasion.

name: Cold-Pressed Fruit Juice Bundle 1L
description: 100% pure cold-pressed juice — no added sugar, artificial colours, or preservatives. Packed with vitamins from real fruit in mango, orange, and mixed berry varieties.

name: Premium Loose Leaf Green Tea 100g
description: Hand-picked high-altitude green tea leaves with a delicate grassy aroma, light golden brew, and powerful antioxidants. Brew daily for calm focus and natural wellness.

name: Nescafe Gold Arabica Blend Coffee 250g
description: Smooth, balanced medium-roast coffee crafted from 100% Arabica beans with rich chocolate and caramel notes. Dissolves instantly for a café-quality cup every single morning.

name: Aveeno Oat Milk Blend Nourishing Shampoo 12oz
description: Oat milk and keratin-infused formula gently cleanses while deeply nourishing dry, damaged hair. Dermatologist-tested, sulfate-free, and safe for color-treated hair.

name: Johnson's Kids Gentle Tearless Shampoo 400ml
description: No-tears formula clinically proven gentle for children's sensitive eyes and delicate scalp. Hypoallergenic, paraben-free, and leaves hair soft, clean, and tangle-free with every wash.

name: Impecca Blonde Color-Protecting Shampoo
description: Purple pigment formula neutralizes brassy tones and protects blonde, silver, and highlighted hair. Hydrates with argan oil while extending colour vibrancy between salon visits.

name: Dove Moisturizing Beauty Bar Soap
description: With ¼ moisturizing cream, Dove Beauty Bar gently cleanses without stripping skin's natural moisture. Dermatologist-recommended for soft, hydrated, healthy-feeling skin every day.

name: Pears Pure & Gentle Transparent Glycerin Soap
description: Iconic transparent glycerin bar enriched with natural oils — Pears' 200-year-old heritage formula is gentle enough for sensitive skin, leaving it visibly clear and moisturized.

name: Natural Ayurvedic Herbal Bar Soap Collection
description: Handcrafted with neem, turmeric, and aloe vera extracts — this toxin-free Ayurvedic soap deeply cleanses, fights bacteria, and restores skin's natural glow naturally.

name: David's Sensitive Natural Toothpaste
description: Plant-based fluoride toothpaste with nano-hydroxyapatite and peppermint oil. Whitens gently, remineralizes enamel, and soothes sensitive teeth — free from SLS, parabens, and artificial dyes.

name: Crest 3D White Deep Stain Remover Toothpaste
description: Advanced micro-cleansing whitening technology removes 10 years of surface stains in just 3 days. Strengthens enamel while delivering fresh, long-lasting minty clean breath.

name: Persil Power Laundry Detergent Powder 3kg
description: Persil's deep-clean enzyme formula tackles tough stains at cold temperatures, brightens whites, protects colours, and leaves a fresh long-lasting fragrance with every wash.

name: Vim Lemon Dishwash Liquid Gel 500ml
description: Concentrated lemon-power formula cuts through grease in seconds, removes dried food residue, and leaves dishes sparkling clean. Gentle on hands, tough on grease and grime.

name: Max Lemon Dishwash Bar & Gel Combo Pack
description: Dual-action dishwash combo with antibacterial bar soap and multipurpose gel. Effective on oil, curry stains, and dried food — economical and long-lasting for everyday kitchen use.
